zone_name: Mareldjan Guard Barracks - City of Mareldja

2002.name: City Prison
2002.description: Large stone bricks make up the entirety of this room in the bowels of the barracks. Wrought iron sconces are bracketed to the walls, providing a home for the torches which provide the primary illumination. Separate from the palace cells, these also hold all variety of criminals when needed.

npcs.name: City jailer
npcs.description: extremely seriously. A small beer gut speaks to plenty of time spent at the Steel Helm spending his well-earned coin, made from guarding the prison.

2003.name: A Prison Cell
2003.description: Maybe big enough for two human men laying horizontal, these cells were not designed with comfort in mind. A wooden pallet rests in one corner and a wooden bucket rests in the other. Every cell in this prison was most likely designed to be uniform. A city guard deserter struggles to stand, but collapses on the ground.

npcs.name: City guard deserter
npcs.description: the hills to the northwest of Mareldja. He was sentenced to hang by Teltheilar and spend what's left of his very short life in this cell.

1667.name: Before the Barracks
1667.description: A stone road makes it way from the palace entrance to the east up to a squat barracks, winding its way through a yard of tightly packed earth. To each side you see men wearing the symbols of the city guard officers drilling new recruits in various weaponry.

npcs.description: advice as he drills in the use of the longbow.

npcs.name: City guard
npcs.description: Clad in grey and a deep shade of turquoise, the guard walks the walls of Mareldja with a slow, measured tread.

3047.name: The Armory
3047.description: Steel and leather armaments line the walls both hung from pegs and set up on stands. The southern wall is dedicated to a row of lockers to store personal effects. An arched doorway leads out to the main chamber.

n.to_zone: Mareldjan Guard Barracks - City of Mareldja

npcs.name: City guard quartermaster
npcs.description: guard and probably wouldn't take kindly to you messing with his equipment.

2722.name: Guard Commanders Office
2722.description: The office of the commander of the city guard is surprisingly simple and utilitarian. A plain rug covers the stone floor and is topped by a sturdy wooden desk with a large, high backed chair behind it and two wooden chairs sitting before it. A map of Mareldja plasters one wall, complete with markings to indicate different patrols. A plated door leads to the west, and a large window overlooks the practice field to the east.

npcs.name: Guard commander, bartos
npcs.description: assesses if you are a threat before dismissing you with the confidence of an experienced warrior. The son of Bartek himself, that confidence may not be

1669.name: Barracks - Second Floor
1669.description: The sounds of numerous guardsmen and women trickle up from the staircase leading below, standing in contrast to the relative quiet of the second floor where the officers have their offices. Two stout doors announce the entrances to two such rooms, leading south and east respectively.

1902.name: Clerk's Office
1902.description: This neat office is the bureaucratic heart of the city guards, handling every affair from finance to scheduling. A steel filing cabinet dominates the eastern wall and a large wooden desk rests under a small window to the west.
